commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

issues.description: Lack of hover states or subtle interaction feedback on the forecast items.
issues.fix: Add a subtle hover effect (e.g., slight lift or background tint) to forecast day columns to indicate interactivity.

issues.description: The layout of the metrics row could be better balanced visually.
issues.fix: Apply flex-grow: 1 to the metric stacks to ensure they divide the container space evenly.

evaluations.critique: The component is clean, well-structured, and correctly leverages the provided design system primitives. It fulfills all functional requirements including data mapping and prop handling. Adding minor interaction states for the forecast items would improve the UX polish.

evaluation.critique: The component has good structure and hierarchy with clear sections, and properly renders all data from props without hardcoding. However, it uses hardcoded fallback hex colors (#52525b, #0284c7) alongside design tokens, and lacks polish touches like hover states or transitions. The forecast strip's `wrap={true}` could cause layout issues on smaller screens since it doesn't use a proper responsive grid.

commit.name: Interactive Periodic Table
commit.description: CSS Grid periodic table with category coloring, search, and detail panel
commit.prompt:
Build an interactive periodic table of elements.

Layout:
- CSS Grid: 18 columns. Place each element using gridRow and gridColumn from its data.
- Each cell: symbol (large, centered), atomic number (small, top-left)
- Color-code by category using design tokens (e.g., noble-gas → one color, halogen → another)
- Search input at top — filters by name or symbol (case-insensitive)
- Click an element → detail panel below grid shows: name, symbol, atomicNumber, atomicWeight, category
- Legend showing each category with its color

All element data comes from props.elements. Use design system CSS variables.

issues.description: The element cells are missing hover states and keyboard interaction support (tabIndex/onKeyDown).
issues.fix: Add a focusable tabindex and a styled hover effect to the Card element wrapper.

issues.description: Elements are using a div with role='button' but lack aria-label and keyboard event handling.
issues.fix: Use a proper <button> element or add onKeyDown handlers for Enter/Space and an aria-label='{element.name}'.

issues.description: The filtered results cause the grid to collapse unexpectedly, potentially breaking the periodic table layout when items are missing.
issues.fix: Use opacity: 0 or visibility: hidden for non-matching items instead of removing them from the DOM to maintain grid integrity.

evaluations.critique: The component successfully implements the complex CSS grid layout and handles the requested state logic effectively. It needs more focus on accessibility standards for the custom interactive cells and a better approach to filtering to maintain the visual structure of the periodic table.

evaluation.critique: The component correctly implements a grid-based periodic table with proper search filtering and detail panel, but has several token inconsistencies and polish gaps. The layout uses hardcoded fallback hex colors in token values (e.g., 'var(--ggui-color-info-500, #06b6d4)') which defeats the purpose of design tokens, and interactive states (hover, focus, active) are completely missing from clickable elements.
